info: When landing weapon attacks, deal 85% of your scaled damage in an ~18.25 stud AoE as typeless damage. This does not hit the initial victim. You can only proc this effect once per weapon swing; hitting two targets will only create one AoE. Allies only take 50% of your scaled damage from the Wild procs instead of the full 85%.
name: Wild
in_game_desc: On hit, deal 85% of your weapon's damage in an AoE. This AoE cannot hit allies or the enemy originally hit. Reduces your damage against allies by 50%.
